description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and clean, rectangular lines. The front features a large balcony with a wooden railing above a covered porch area, and the entryway is accentuated by a small set of steps and a minimalist door. Large windows dominate the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior, while smaller windows are distributed asymmetrically on the sides and rear. The house is surrounded by a paved driveway, a wooden deck, and landscaped areas with several trees and shrubs. The exterior is finished in light gray and white tones, with wooden accents adding warmth to the design. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, suitable for an upscale urban neighborhood.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a balcony, and landscaped surroundings in light gray and white with wooden accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, balcony, large windows, and landscaped yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, side windows, and the transition from driveway to deck.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal windows, a plain facade, and visible trees in the background.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the balcony, side landscaping, and a more private aspect of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large front windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main door with a small set of steps, covered porch, and balcony above
